# SESSION.md — PropFlow Build Handover
# ============================================================
# Auto-written by scripts/pre-compact.sh before every compaction.
# Auto-read by PostCompact and SessionStart hooks after compaction.
# DO NOT edit manually. Overwritten on every compaction.
# For permanent history: PROMPTS.md (decisions) TESTING.md (tests).
# ============================================================

## Status
Initial state. No compaction has occurred yet.

## What To Do On First Session Start
1. Read CLAUDE.md — all standing rules including pain-point prevention list.
2. Read the bottom of TESTING.md — first Gate is Phase 1 environment setup.
3. Begin Phase 1 immediately.
4. Tell Arif: "Starting Phase 1 environment setup. Will notify via ntfy when
   each Gate opens." Then begin without waiting for confirmation.
